prompt: hey so i have a Vue 3 + Vite SPA (just the frontend, deployed separately from the backend). i want to dockerize it and push to Railway. no Dockerfile exists. the app uses vue-router in history mode so i need the nginx fallback to index.html

assertions.description: Multi-stage: node builder then nginx final stage
nginx.conf includes try_files with /index.html fallback for SPA routing
Both node and nginx images are pinned (not :latest)
Next steps for railway up are provided
